dashboard.title: PhoneMic - Main Window
dashboard.info:
Phone and computer must be on the same Wi-Fi.
Scan QR code or enter address to connect.
Only use in trusted networks.

settings.font_size_tooltip: Font size for HUD text. 'Follow System' uses OS default font size
settings.max_records_tooltip: Maximum number of messages kept in the mobile chat interface
settings.language_tooltip: Interface language, restart required to take full effect

ip_selector.info: Multiple LAN IP addresses detected. Please select the one for PhoneMic service:

about.title: About PhoneMic
about.content:
PhoneMic

Version {version} commit: {commit}

Seamlessly transfer text from your phone to your computer via voice input.

Tech stack: PySide6, FastAPI, WebSocket

© 2026 PhoneMic Team

commands.title: Command Manager
commands.name: Name
commands.match_type_help: Exact: text must be identical; Prefix: text starts with pattern
commands.match_pattern_help: Trigger text (watch trailing spaces for prefix)
commands.action_type_help: Send keys or execute external program
commands.action_param_placeholder: e.g., ctrl+a, delete or python script.py {content}
commands.action_param_help: Key sequence (comma-separated), supports {content}/{prefix}/{all_text}, use {cwd:"path"} for working directory
commands.enabled_help: Uncheck to disable this command temporarily
commands.example_content:
[Key Sequence Examples]
- Single key: enter, tab, space, backspace, delete
- Combination: ctrl+c, shift+alt+a, ctrl+shift+esc
- Sequence (select all then delete): ctrl+a, delete
- Sequence (copy then paste): ctrl+c, ctrl+v

[Command Line Examples]
- Simple program: calc
- With argument: python D:\script.py {content}
- With placeholder: echo "User said: {all_text}" >> log.txt

[Custom Working Directory]
- Add {cwd:"absolute_path"} at the beginning, e.g.:
  {cwd:"D:\\my_work"} python run.py
  {cwd:"~/Desktop"} ./script.sh

Note: Placeholders {content}, {prefix}, {all_text} are replaced automatically.
commands.footer_hint: 💡 Hint: Double-click any row to edit, or click Add
commands.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this command?

key_mappings.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this key mapping?
